    C

    Controllers - package Controllers
     

    E

    EmployeeController - Class in Controllers
    Controller for managing employee data, including adding, updating, and deleting employee records.
    EmployeeController() - Constructor for class Controllers.EmployeeController
     

    H

    handleChartSwitch() - Method in class Controllers.OrderStatisticsController
    Switches to product usage chart
    handleChartSwitch() - Method in class Controllers.ProductUsageController
    Switches to the sales report chart
    handleGenerateReport() - Method in class Controllers.ProductUsageController
    Clears the chart and loads new data
    handleGenerateSalesReport() - Method in class Controllers.OrderStatisticsController
    Clears the chart and loads new data

    I

    initialize() - Method in class Controllers.MainController
     
    initialize() - Method in class Controllers.OrderStatisticsController
    Initializes the chart to load the last 30 days
    initialize() - Method in class Controllers.ProductUsageController
    Initializes the chart to load the last 30 days
    InventoryController - Class in Controllers
    Controller for managing inventory data, including adding, updating, and deleting inventory records.
    InventoryController() - Constructor for class Controllers.InventoryController
     

    M

    MainController - Class in Controllers
    Main controller for the application, responsible for managing the main content area and switching between different views (e.g., order report, employee management, inventory management).
    MainController() - Constructor for class Controllers.MainController
     
    MenuController - Class in Controllers
    Controller for managing menu data, including adding, updating, and deleting menu items.
    MenuController() - Constructor for class Controllers.MenuController
     

    O

    OrderReportController - Class in Controllers
    Controller for generating X and Z reports based on user-selected date and hour.
    OrderReportController() - Constructor for class Controllers.OrderReportController
     
    OrderStatisticsController - Class in Controllers
    Controller for generating a sales report based on user-selected date range.
    OrderStatisticsController() - Constructor for class Controllers.OrderStatisticsController
     

    P

    ProductUsageController - Class in Controllers
    Controller for generating a product usage report based on user-selected date range.
    ProductUsageController() - Constructor for class Controllers.ProductUsageController
     

    S

    showEmployees() - Method in class Controllers.MainController
    Loads the employees page
    showInventory() - Method in class Controllers.MainController
    Loads the inventory page
    showMenu() - Method in class Controllers.MainController
    Loads the menu page
    showOrderReport() - Method in class Controllers.MainController
    Loads the order report page
    showOrderStatistics() - Method in class Controllers.MainController
    Loads the order statistics page
    switchChart(String) - Static method in class Controllers.MainController
    Used within sales report and product usage chart controllers to switch to the opposite chart
